description: Enhanced Resume: inject the saved handoff pointer when a vaulted session starts.

hooks.command: _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _C="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"; if [ ! -f "${_R}/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then _B="$_C/plugins/cache/enhanced-resume/enhanced-resume"; _R=$(find "$_B" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec ls -dt {} + 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); fi; if [ ! -f "${_R}/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then _R="$_C/.tmp/marketplaces/enhanced-resume"; fi; [ -f "${_R}/hooks/session-start.sh" ] || { echo "enhanced-resume: plugin scripts not found" >&2; exit 1; }; export CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="$_R"; bash "$_R/hooks/session-start.sh"
